phases.title: Program Foundation and Source Baseline
phases.outcome: Control the corpus, authority hierarchy, requirement register, and program roles.

phases.title: Repository Intake and Evidence Preservation
phases.outcome: Acquire and preserve the exact implementation and operational evidence.

phases.title: Current-State Semantic Reconstruction
phases.outcome: Reconstruct implementation meaning, behavior, authority, experience, and operations.

phases.title: Repository-Specific Roadmap Instantiation
phases.outcome: Generate exact repository increments and dependency DAG.

phases.title: Integration and Operational Conformance
phases.outcome: Prove capabilities compose securely and recoverably.

phases.title: Release and Evolution Baseline
phases.outcome: Accept an identified implementation and operating profile.
